metadata_mapping.scene_title: h1 text on scene page; also in <title> and og:title meta
metadata_mapping.date: relative date string (e.g. '6 years ago') in page text near duration/views — requires conversion to approximate ISO date
metadata_mapping.description: og:description meta tag or inline paragraph near the video player
metadata_mapping.performers: links to /models/ slugs found on scene page
metadata_mapping.tags: links to /tags/ slugs found on scene page
metadata_mapping.studio: Gay0Day (constant — site is a tube aggregator, no per-scene studio field)

date: Look for text matching pattern 'X years ago', 'X months ago', 'X days ago' near duration/views block
Convert relative date to approximate ISO 8601 using dateutil.relativedelta or manual arithmetic from scrape time
description: paragraph following video player if OG tag absent
performers: a[href*='/models/'] — collect href slugs and display text from scene page
tags: a[href*='/tags/'] — collect tag label text from scene page

search_strategy.notes: Returns a list of video cards. Each card has a link to /videos/{id}/{slug}/. Parse title and URL from search result cards to build scene list.

fragment_matching_strategy.notes: Use scene title or filename fragment as search query. Take the top result if title similarity is high enough (fuzzy match recommended).

performer_page_fields.name: h2 or heading on /models/{slug}/ page
performer_page_fields.country: listed as 'Country: N/A' or populated value
performer_page_fields.city: listed as 'City: N/A' or populated value
performer_page_fields.age: listed as 'Age: 0' or populated value — treat 0 as unknown
performer_page_fields.height: listed as 'Height: N/A' or populated value
performer_page_fields.weight: listed as 'Weight: N/A' or populated value
performer_page_fields.image: profile image if present on model page

anti_bot_or_access_notes: No Cloudflare or captcha detected as of May 2026
Add short delay between requests if scraping multiple pages
known_limitations: Date is relative, not absolute — approximate ISO conversion required
Performer metadata fields are frequently empty or N/A
No per-scene studio field — site is a tube aggregator
No structured JSON-LD or API detected
Search result quality depends on title match — may return false positives for fragment matching
